title: New Traveler's Notebooks in the Shop!
excerpt: We've had so many people asking about the notebooks I've been using lately so we decided to have more made from my papers with American Crafts! All available in the shop now!
body:
We've had so many people asking about the notebooks I've been using lately so we decided to have more made from my papers with American Crafts! 

All available in the shop now!
